title: RetroPixel
description: A shader that adds graphics from (super secret settings - Bits)
body:
RetroPixel (Bits)
RetroPixel is a lightweight shader pack for Minecraft 1.20.1+ that faithfully recreates the iconic pixelated look from the classic "Super Secret Settings - Bits" filter.
Created by TimaTapok, this shader brings back the nostalgic, low-res aesthetic of retro gaming while providing modern compatibility and customization options.
Key Features:
Classic Bits Aesthetic: Perfectly replicates the pixelation effect originally found in Minecraft's legacy "Super Secret Settings".
Customizable Pixelation: Includes an in-game slider to adjust the pixel size (from subtle 2x to extreme 8-bit pixelation).
